---
title: "Cooperative AI"
short-title: "Cooperative AI"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "The Dafoe et al. 2020 research agenda, multi-agent safety, and the future of machine cooperation."
keywords: ["cooperative AI", "multi-agent safety", "Dafoe", "machine cooperation"]
---

# Cooperative AI {#sec-cooperative-ai}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
